arts.ttl: Inter and Touted Youngster Rejected Bids Before Renewal
arts.sum: Inter recently announced to have extended the contract of Kristjan Asllani until 2028. He has played sparingly but somewhat consistently in his first two seasons at San Siro, and the Nerazzurri believe in his potential. Moreover, the figures are relatively small.
